records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think it's unfair? How can I beat guns with a megaphone?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think it's unfair? How can I beat guns with a megaphone?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think it's unfair? How can I beat guns with a megaphone?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Drop your weapons and fight fair and square!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Drop your weapons and fight fair and square!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Drop your weapons and fight fair and square!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Do you feel confident in melee combat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. Do you feel confident in melee combat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Do you feel confident in melee combat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all! So please, can't you just leave us alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all! So please, can't you just leave us alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all! So please, can't you just leave us alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do we do? We're getting cornered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do we do? We're getting cornered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do we do? We're getting cornered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief? What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief? What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This... isn't playtime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This... isn't playtime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This... isn't playtime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why doesn't anyone understand? We're not lying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why doesn't anyone understand? We're not lying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why doesn't anyone understand? We're not lying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. It's just tag, albeit a little aggressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. It's just tag, albeit a little aggressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. It's just tag, albeit a little aggressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Liar. Tag is supposed to be fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Liar. Tag is supposed to be fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Liar. Tag is supposed to be fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But neither you nor ALT Squad are smiling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But neither you nor ALT Squad are smiling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But neither you nor ALT Squad are smiling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeeek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeeek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeeek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-sorry. I didn't mean to shoot that hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sorry. I didn't mean to shoot that hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sorry. I didn't mean to shoot that hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come out now unless you want to get hurt!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come out now unless you want to get hurt!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come out now unless you want to get hurt!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll start shooting if you don't come out while I count to three.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll start shooting if you don't come out while I count to three.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll start shooting if you don't come out while I count to three.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two...

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Chief. Do you want to race again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Chief. Do you want to race again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Chief. Do you want to race again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoever makes it farther wins, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoever makes it farther wins, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoever makes it farther wins, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! There's no use in finding treasure all alone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! There's no use in finding treasure all alone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! There's no use in finding treasure all alone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just a race, though! Come on, Chief!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just a race, though! Come on, Chief!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just a race, though! Come on, Chief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tranquilizer darts, on standby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tranquilizer darts, on standby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tranquilizer darts, on standby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shoot, Xiao Lin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shoot, Xiao Lin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shoot, Xiao Lin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: YUPPIEEEEEEEE!
records.m_Talk_DEU: YUPPIEEEEEEEE!
records.m_Talk_FRA: YUPPIEEEEEEEE!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Chief...
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Chief...
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Chief...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry... I guess this is it... for...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry... I guess this is it... for...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry... I guess this is it... for...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't even get hit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't even get hit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't even get hit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, it's the maids!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, it's the maids!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, it's the maids!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...? Do you know the chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...? Do you know the chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...? Do you know the chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds like...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds like...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds like...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like non-lethal, but still. Not appropriate against children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like blanks, but still. Not appropriate against children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like blanks, but still. Not appropriate against children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Mone played by Lily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That Mone played by Lily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That Mone played by Lily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. I admire your will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. I admire your will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. I admire your will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your patience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your patience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your patience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swoosh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swoosh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swoosh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swoosh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swoosh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swoosh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see clearly now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see clearly now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see clearly now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boring. You are no match for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boring. You are no match for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boring. You are no match for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just kidding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just kidding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just kidding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lessgo!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lessgo!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lessgo!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Woohoo!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Woohoo!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Woohoo!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! That brat. I'll make you pay for this when we get back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better be ready for Lycoris's full-course meal of spicy food!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh. It doesn't hurt that much, actually.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't even get hit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't even get hit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't even get hit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* We're supposed to be on vacation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, it's the maids!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, it's the maids!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, it's the maids!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...? Do you know the chief?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...? Do you know the chief?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...? Do you know the chief?

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I can't believe it, Captain! I told you I'd help, ma'am! Did you forget about me already?!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I heard it from Titan! Mone is supposed to be a part of the Sigma Pirates, too... It's really upsetting, ma'am!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds like...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds like...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds like...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Lily of the Flora Maid Service, here to provide assistance in your moment of need.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sigma, and Yuppie. Mone asked us a favor, and we are here to help you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* You're lucky we were on the island anyway. Who knew they'd shoot guns at children?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like non-lethal, but still. Not appropriate against children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like blanks, but still. Not appropriate against children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like blanks, but still. Not appropriate against children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. The ridiculously spicy food that you made before is what's really inappropriate against children.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought Mone re-awakened as a fire-ability Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-come on! People make mistakes! There was nothing wrong with it when I tried it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. Could you move aside, please?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a bit awkward for third parties to interfere with family matters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Family matters? Please refrain from terms that might cause the lady to misunderstand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I thought you knew. We're here in the island under the name of Coffin Company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, who are just outsiders, we can't risk tarnishing Boss's reputation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I guess I was being rude to Master's business partner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was confused, as you were too far from Master's taste.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Cap? Why are you loading real bullets?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unexpected variables must be dealt with quickly. That was one of the basics of when we were in the Dark Network.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'm just going to spook them a little.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As we expected. We've successfully taunted them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that okay, though? They are a Counter squad of an official TASKFORCE.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. We've handled tasks that were much more dangerous before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, they can't be too reckless in a vacation spot with a lot of civilians.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The adults are going to play now, so you kids run along.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Leave this to us and keep going.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. And, there was another message from Mone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I believe in you, Captain! You'll be able to find the treasure!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: "I'm rooting for you from afar, ma'am!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: That Mone played by Lily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That Mone played by Lily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That Mone played by Lily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. I admire your will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. I admire your will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. I admire your will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Sigma will not forget Lily and Lycoris's sacrifice! Yarr!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not really a sacrifice, though. I guess like father, like daughter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sigma, and Yuppie. I wish you good luck.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Lily and Lycoris.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your patience.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your patience.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your patience.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let us give you a grand welcome in the name of the Flora Maid Service.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. You cowards, hiding behind cover!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Kim Sobin! Blow them all up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mad? Think about the consequences.

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-right... We almost didn't get paid in time because the company was struggling financially.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk... Formation E! Quickly subdue one of them first!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good luck. You're going to never hit me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swoosh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swoosh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swoosh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swoosh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swoosh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swoosh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why is she so wobbly?! Are you an invertebrate?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see clearly now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see clearly now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see clearly now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boring. You are no match for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boring. You are no match for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boring. You are no match for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will soon be lying on the cold, hard ground... Phew, this makes me an assassin for Mansion again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just kidding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just kidding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just kidding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lessgo!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lessgo!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lessgo!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Where do you think you're going?! There's no cover there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Woohoo!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Woohoo!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Woohoo!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...! That brat. I'll make you pay for this when we get back!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...! That brat. I'll make you pay for this when we get back!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...! That brat. I'll make you pay for this when we get back!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better be ready for Lycoris's full-course meal of spicy food!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You'd better be ready for Lycoris's full-course meal of spicy food!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better be ready for Lycoris's full-course meal of spicy food!
